name: Stage 2
description: Aggressive tune + EGR off. ~+30% torque. Requires healthy injectors; intercooler upgrade strongly recommended; exhaust de-restriction recommended. NOT for stock turbo at sustained full load. EGR is software-disabled.

edits.comment: +32% main fueling at mid-high RPM x mid-high load. Larger area than Stage1, capped to avoid black smoke.
+17% rail pressure for finer atomisation under the bigger fueling. Capped 28000 to stay below pump wear limit.
+10% boost target across a wider RPM x load region. Capped at 1900 (raw counts) to keep below VGT vane overshoot.
+50% torque limit ceiling, capped 9500. Intended to clear the limiter at mid-RPM where Stage2 fueling produces real torque.
EGR off: same software EGR delete as Stage1 - flatten phase-of-injection map to its factory ceiling so the ECU disengages EGR closed-loop control.
